description_long: This is a large commercial cargo airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in white and gray, accented by bold red and black graphics along the tail and engine nacelles. The aircraft features two underwing turbofan engines, swept-back low-mounted wings, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with visible nose and main gear units. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the flight crew. The airplane displays branding and text on the fuselage, indicating its use for logistics or freight transport.
description: A large, white and gray cargo airplane with swept low wings, twin underwing engines, and bold red and black tail graphics.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, red and black tail design, and the symmetrical placement of engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fuselage branding, engine details, and the extended landing gear.
description_view_2: Frontal view emphasizing the cockpit windows, nose landing gear, and the forward sweep of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side's branding and engine, with clear visibility of the tail graphics.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows integrated into the fuselage nose.
